column1: # L1 Core fillers (defense / utility / reaction / passive / mobility to round out the roster)

column3: Reaction: when a signal or enhancement ability targets you, re-route the incoming thread back into its source's feed.
Wrap yourself in a dampening lattice; hostile signal pings slide off you until your next turn.
Skim the ambient wire-chatter around a target; reveal one augmentation, tag, or hidden status they carry.
Passive: while you stand adjacent to Wire Craft infrastructure, enemies take a penalty to locate or target you.
Slip along a stretched wire-filament between two points you can see; ignores difficult terrain and small obstructions.
Reaction: when an ally within your weave is hit, bleed the strike's feedback into the attacker as static burn.
Level-Up: you now hum on two frequencies; once per round, a SIGNAL check may be retried at a different harmonic.
Level-Up: passive weave extends one pace around you; allies inside the weave gain a small VEIL benefit.

column1: # L3 Subclass — Combat Weave (battle-grid weaver; iron-signal threads around you)

column3: Draw a humming wire-line between two points; any hostile crossing it this round is slashed by taut signal.
Fling a crosshatch of iron thread onto a tile; the first enemy to enter is rooted as the lattice cinches tight.
Reaction: a filament snaps taut across an incoming melee arc, shearing part of the blow before it lands.
Weave an iron ring around a target; each turn the target remains, the ring cinches closer and applies increasing pressure.

column1: # L3 Subclass — Wire Broker (mercenary of wire-markets; buys and sells signal access)

column3: Trade a second of your VEIL to an ally; they gain concealment for their next action, you are briefly more visible.
Place a lien on a target's signal feed; you may call in the debt later for a free SIGNAL check against them.
Quote the going rate to an enemy: they pay AP to act normally next turn, or suffer a penalty.
Bind an ally and an enemy with a brokered signal-contract; damage taken by one is split with the other until the clause breaks.

column1: # L3 Subclass — Iron Afterlife Weave (wire-dialog with the resonant dead)

column3: Open a whisper-thin line to the resonant dead in the area; gain a single piece of insight the living cannot provide.
Pull a dead soldier's grudge through the wire; your next strike against a marked foe lands with their hatred behind it.
Let the dead speak in chorus through your weave; enemies in range hear the names of their own dead and are shaken.
Tie a knot of mourning-wire over a fallen body; for a short time, the dead can act once more through the weave.

column1: # L3 Subclass — Loom Maker (architect of mega-wire structures; weaves entire zones)

column3: Set a wire anchor at your current position; your future weaves originate from or pass through this anchor.
Weave a broad warp across a zone; allies inside move faster along its grain, enemies move slower against it.
Raise a tall wall of interlaced wire between two anchors; blocks line of sight and bleeds signal that touches it.
Commit a named pattern into the zone (bless, curse, or mark); anyone stepping on it triggers its effect once.
Power: wear the wire as a crown; for the next rounds, every SIGNAL check you make pulls a minor secondary effect along with it.
Power: name one ally; until the thread breaks, you and they share a channel — you can pass an action, a veil, or a wound between you.
Subclass Power: in a zone you designate, every wire becomes an edge; hostiles crossing it take shearing damage and slow.
Subclass Power: draw every filament you have into a shining aegis around an ally; they cannot be hit by the next incoming attack.
Subclass Power: call in every outstanding lien at once; all marked enemies suffer feedback and lose their next action as the debts are collected.
Subclass Power: declare an auction on the battlefield; allies may spend AP to buy each other's cards or effects for one round.

column1: # L9 Subclass Power — Iron Afterlife Weave

column3: Subclass Power: summon a cohort of wire-sheathed dead who carry an ally across the battlefield, shielding them along the route.
Subclass Power: hold open a channel with the dead across an entire fight; once per round, ask one question and the dead answer truthfully.
Subclass Power: raise a vaulted loom over the battlefield; the zone gains a single rule of your choosing while the loom stands.
Subclass Power: fold two anchors together; for a moment, the space between them collapses and any unit may step from one to the other.
